info.description: Copy for the /community/membership page (the secondary Reset Room sales page). The main sales page is /community/reset-room; this is the simpler 'subpage' version linked from Community.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label that sits ABOVE the main heading. Keep it short — 1 to 3 words. Examples: 'For founders', 'A note from Anna', 'New series'.

paragraphs_v2.description: Membership page body paragraphs. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL.

price_label.description: Free-text price label shown to customers. Use this when you want to add nuance ('£49 / month', 'From £200', 'Investment by enquiry'). For straight one-off prices use the Price field too.

includes_label.default: Live group session, replay library, workbook, community

trial_label.default: First month free after paid workshop

cta_label.description: Button text. Keep it short and action-oriented. Examples: 'Book your place', 'Read more', 'Apply now'. Avoid filler like 'Click here'.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
